name: FMC Europe 2020

venue.name: Multiple venues; [Registered locations](https://fmc-europe2020.fewest-moves.com/)
venue.address: Multiple locations throughout Europe (see competition website)

information:
# The competition is cancelled due to the COVID-19 outbreak.
### This includes all locations!

The competition will be held in multiple locations, throughout Europe. **Please pay attention to the time zone of your location!** For more details, check out the competition website!

More locations may be added until the 21st of February 2020, 23:59 UTC. If there is no location near you yet, make sure to regularly check our [website](https://fmc-europe2020.fewest-moves.com/) for new locations!
